1N-2D-2H-4N-6H. North transfers to hearts and South completes; North's 4NT invites slam. With four-card support the nine-card fit is worth extra, so even a fifteen-count accepts - and in the suit, 6H. Made 12.
Slam auction after Stayman/Jacoby; usable but not in the core quantitative-accept set.
1N-2C-2D-4N-6N. No fit; South accepts the quantitative invitation with a good sixteen, the five-card club suit supplying the extra trick. Made 12.
